goal: Read Gantt chart from Google Sheets, identify urgent tasks (Critical/High priority) finishing within the next 3 full days (excluding today), and email a formatted table of results to the user. If no tasks match, send an informational email instead.

config.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for the Gantt chart
Name of the sheet tab containing the Gantt data
Header name for the task name column
Comma-separated list of priority values considered urgent
Number of full days ahead (excluding today) to check for finishing tasks
Email address to send the notification to

invariants: Only tasks with non-empty task name (column A) are considered valid
Only tasks with Priority exactly 'Critical' or 'High' are considered urgent
Date window is tomorrow through 3 days from now (excluding today), using user's account timezone
An email is always sent — either with matching tasks or a no-results message
required_outcomes: An email is sent to the configured recipient with either a table of urgent tasks finishing soon or a message indicating no such tasks exist
The email includes a link to the source Google Sheet

steps.summary: Read all rows from the Gantt tab of the Google Sheet
Convert raw 2D array rows into task objects using the first row as headers, mapping column A to task_name, column F to finish_date, column G to priority

transform.description: Convert 2D array rows (with header row) into objects with task_name, finish_date, and priority fields. Row 0 is headers. Column A (index 0) = task_name, Column F (index 5) = finish_date, Column G (index 6) = priority.

steps.summary: Filter out rows with empty task names to keep only valid task rows

transform.description: Keep only rows where task_name is non-empty

steps.summary: Filter to only tasks with Priority exactly 'Critical' or 'High'

transform.description: Keep only tasks where priority is Critical or High

steps.summary: Compute date window boundaries (tomorrow and 3 days from now) and days until finish for each task
Keep only tasks whose finish date falls within the window: tomorrow (days_until_finish >= 1) through 3 days from now (days_until_finish <= date_window_days)

transform.description: Keep tasks where days_until_finish >= 1 AND days_until_finish <= date_window_days (i.e., finishing tomorrow through 3 days from now, excluding today)

steps.summary: Sort matching tasks by finish date ascending (earliest first)

transform.description: Sort tasks by days_until_finish ascending so earliest finishing tasks appear first

steps.summary: Count the number of matching urgent tasks to determine email content path
Compose an HTML email body with either a table of urgent tasks or a no-results message, including a link to the source spreadsheet

generate.reason: Free-form HTML email body composition with conditional content (table vs no-results message), professional styling, and dynamic spreadsheet link — requires semantic composition, not a deterministic template
generate.instruction:
Generate an HTML email for notifying about urgent Gantt chart tasks finishing soon.

Rules:
1. If sorted_tasks is empty (matching_count is 0), compose a brief professional email stating: 'No urgent tasks (Critical or High priority) are scheduled to finish within the next 3 days (excluding today).'
2. If sorted_tasks has items, compose an email with:
   - A brief intro: 'The following urgent tasks from your Gantt chart are scheduled to finish within the next 3 days:'
   - An HTML table with columns: Task, Finish Date, Priority
   - Use professional table styling: borders, header row with background color, padding
   - Data comes from sorted_tasks fields: task_name, finish_date, priority
3. In both cases, include a link to the source Google Sheet at the bottom: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1RHLbBXzrKv24gNgp7a4Lr7RlMIrP9fjacfGWjhPAbOE/edit
4. Use a professional tone.
5. The subject line should be: 'Urgent Gantt Tasks Finishing Soon' if there are tasks, or 'No Urgent Gantt Tasks Finishing Soon' if empty.

outputs.name: body
outputs.description: Full HTML email body with table or no-results message and spreadsheet link

steps.summary: Send the composed email to the configured recipient

meta.plan_title: Urgent Gantt Tasks Finishing Soon — Email Notifier
meta.notes: The workflow reads from a specific Gantt sheet, filters for urgent priority tasks finishing within the next 3 full days (excluding today), and always sends an email — either with a formatted table or a no-results message. Date comparisons use days_until_finish computed via date_diff to handle timezone-aware comparisons. The raw 2D array from Sheets is mapped using positional indices since the data has not been converted to objects by a prior rows_to_objects step.
